How it works

Simple by design

For Tradies

Get your skills seen

1
Create your profile — trade, experience, and certifications
2
Connect your Midnight wallet for ZK proof of identity
3
LBH verifies your licences and issues your Verified badge
4
Receive direct enquiries from employers — completely free
Join 200+ verified tradies
For Employers

Access verified talent

1
Create a free employer account to access the network
2
Browse the full pool of LBH-verified workers
3
Filter by trade, location, Labour Score, and availability
4
Contact workers directly — no middleman, no commissions
Find your next tradie today

Labour by Hire connects verified tradies with employers across Australia. Free forever. Each profile gets a Midnight wallet ZK proof of identity.

How it works

Up and running in 4 steps

Step 01
📝
Create your profile
Add your trade, experience, licence, and hourly rate. Takes about 3 minutes.
Step 02
🌙
Connect Midnight Wallet
Your construction ID gets a ZK proof of identity. Completely free.
Step 03
✅
We verify you
Our team checks your licence and White Card within 24 hours. LBH Verified badge issued.
Step 04
📬
Employers find you
Your profile goes live. Employers search, view your Labour Score, and message you directly.

Layer 2 · Equipment Trust

Equipment hire

Verified tradie-owned equipment available across Australia

Loading equipment…

Coming Soon

Beyond the marketplace.
Own a piece of it.

Fractionalised equipment assets yielding rental income. Tradie-led property projects raising capital through the platform. Two layers designed to compound.

Early Access
Get notified at launch
Be first when Spotlight equipment tokens go live. No spam.
✓ You're on the list. We'll reach out before launch.
~Month 18
🏗️
Layer 2
Spotlight Equipment Trust
LBH purchases construction equipment — starting with concrete mixers and scissor lifts, scaling to cranes. Each asset is fractionalised into 500 Hedera HTS tokens representing units in a registered trust.
◆Token holders earn rental yield from tradie equipment bookings
◆LBH earns a platform fee before yield is distributed
◆Sophisticated investors only under s708 Corporations Act
◆No AFSL required at launch · Registered unit trust structure
~Month 30+
🏠
Layer 3
Spotlight Property
Verified tradies with high Labour Scores can raise capital through the platform to build and sell property. Investors fund projects via a CSF-compliant offer. LBH acts as intermediary under its AFSL.
◆Requires Labour Score above threshold to raise capital
◆Equipment from Layer 2 gets deployed on these builds
◆AFSL with CSF authorisation — in application
◆Retail investor access once AFSL granted
Labour Score
Soulbound NFT · Hedera HTS
Metadata includes
ABN · Licence class · Score · Project count · Dispute count · Verified date
Updated by
Completed jobs · Reviews · Time on platform · Verification status
Unlocks
Equipment hire · Property capital raising · LBHT token fee discounts
About Labour by Hire

Built by the industry.
For the industry.

Labour by Hire is an Australian marketplace connecting verified tradespeople with employers. Not a job board — a construction identity network. Every tradie is licence-checked, ABN-verified, and issued a Labour Score that lives on the Hedera blockchain as a soulbound NFT.
The three-layer model
Layer 1
Marketplace
Tradies pay a one-time listing fee to be found. Employers pay a premium subscription to contact verified tradies. Live now.
Layer 2
Equipment Trust
Construction equipment fractionalised into Hedera HTS tokens. Token holders earn rental yield. Launching ~Month 18.
Layer 3
Property Spotlight
High-score tradies raise capital to build and sell property. CSF-compliant crowdfunding under AFSL. Launching ~Month 30.
Legal structure
Sole trader with ABN registered now. Incorporating as LBH Pty Ltd ~Month 12. AFSL application begins ~Month 24.
Tech stack
Next.js 14 · Tailwind · Supabase · Stripe · Hedera HTS + mirror node · Railway / Vercel
